prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: One tendency or habit of mine that I think most people would not notice but shapes a lot of my responses is my introverted nature. As an introvert, I often reflect on situations before responding, which can lead to thoughtful and considered responses. However, it can also make me appear quiet or unengaged in conversations. Additionally, I prefer one-on-one discussions over large groups, which can sometimes make me seem aloof or uninterested in group activities.
